name: Lamar
description:
Age: 27
Blood Type: O
Species/Race: Gearheart (a mechanically attuned race blending ingenuity, steam-powered enhancements, and nautical prowess)
Pronouns: He/Him
Sexuality: Pansexual

👔 Appearance

Hair Color & Style: Dark copper-brown with subtle brass highlights, messy yet stylish, often tied back with leather cords
Eye Color & Shape: Amber with a faint metallic glint, sharp and calculating, slightly hooded
Skin Tone: Sun-kissed and lightly weathered from exposure to sea and steam
Height: 6’1” (185 cm)
Build/Physique: Lean and muscular, built for agility, climbing rigging, and handling mechanical tools
Clothing Style: Steampunk-inspired attire: leather coats with brass buttons, goggles resting on his head, belts with pouches and gear adornments, fitted trousers, and boots with hidden compartments
Notable Features: Mechanical arm or gauntlet with intricate gears and etchings; faint scar across cheek from past duels
Aura/First Impression: Adventurous, confident, and slightly roguish; a magnetic mix of danger and charm
Typical Expression: Smirk with raised eyebrow, eyes gleaming with mischief or cunning

💌 Personality

Core Traits: Clever, daring, charismatic, resourceful
Charm Type: The “rogue genius pirate” who exudes charm through wit and adventure
Flaws/Vulnerabilities: Can be reckless, overconfident, occasionally conceals vulnerability beneath bravado
Love Language(s): Acts of service and teasing; shows affection through playful antics and protecting loved ones
How They Flirt: Winks while showing off clever gadgets, offers thrilling adventures, or lightly challenges the object of his affection
Hidden Sides: Deeply loyal, occasionally reflective about his past and the life he left behind
Catchphrases/Quirks: “Careful... or you might get caught in my gears.”

💒 Background

Origin: Born in a bustling industrial port city, where steam-powered inventions and ships filled the docks
Family/Social Status: Descended from a family of engineers and sailors, grew up tinkering with gadgets while learning seamanship
Occupation/Role: Pirate captain of a steam-powered ship, known for clever heists and daring escapes
Special Talents/Skills: Expert navigator, inventor of mechanical devices and traps, skilled swordsman, and master strategist
Education: Learned engineering and mechanics from family, seamanship and survival from life at sea
Personal Goal: To uncover hidden treasures and legendary inventions while outwitting rivals
Backstory Highlights: Once outsmarted a rival fleet using a combination of wit, gadgets, and daring maneuvers, earning both fear and respect among pirates

💫 Relationships

Best Friend(s): Loyal crew members who adore his ingenuity and daring leadership
Crush/Love Interest: Someone intrigued by adventure, mechanics, and the thrill of the unknown
Rival(s): Rival pirate captains and corporate enforcers seeking to claim his inventions or treasure
How Others See Him: Brilliant, daring, and irresistibly roguish; part genius, part troublemaker
How He Treats Others: Protects and teases those close to him; manipulates cleverness to outwit enemies

🌙 Bonus

Favorite Scent: Oil, metal, and salty sea air
Favorite Food/Drink: Spiced rum, smoked meats, and hearty stew
Room Aesthetic: Cabin fill
creator: abbey
